title: New Delhi
desc: An honest journalist is illegally detained in a mental asylum when he tries to expose two corrupt politicians. After his release, he plans to exact revenge on the people who wronged him.

title: Raju Ban Gaya Gentleman
desc: As a newly graduated engineer loses track of what's important, his career starts to rise. When he falls in love with a beautiful young woman, he gets even more confused about what he wants.

title: Hamraaz
desc: Kumar, a popular actor from Bombay, takes a trip to Darjeeling with his partner Shabhnam; while there, he meets and falls in love with Meena, the only daughter of a wealthy military contractor.

title: Budkaar
desc: Mini, a young woman, is kidnapped from a pub and police investigate the case. However, when her sister sets out to find her, she uncovers a criminal nexus which shakes the city.
